title: Level Up Lounge
description: Wild Hare Bar Garden transforms into the Level Up Lounge, a retro gaming-inspired Comic-Con pop-up featuring pixel-art décor, themed cocktails, local craft beer, themed food, and interactive photo opportunities.
notes: Open daily during Comic-Con week from 11:00 AM–11:00 PM. No SDCC badge required. Walk-ins welcome on a first-come, first-served basis.

title: Ten Forward at Le Charcuterie Bar
price: Food & Drinks for Purchase (10% Off with SDCC Badge or Costume)
description: Celebrate Comic-Con with themed décor, Star Trek wines, themed charcuterie boards inspired by franchises like Star Trek and Star Wars, interactive tabletop games, and exclusive character stickers with purchase while supplies last.
notes: Receive 10% off when wearing a Comic-Con badge or costume. Featured drinks include Château Picard wines and alcohol-free Synthehol from Star Trek Wines. Games include Star Wars trivia, Marvel Tarot Cards, Star Trek three-dimensional chess, and Lower Decks Buffer Time.

title: Ignition Pavilion Happy Hour
location: Ignition Pavilion at San Diego Wine & Culinary Center
description: The Seven Seas coffee bar transforms into the Ignition Pavilion Happy Hour featuring themed cocktails, beer, wine, mocktails, and Ignition Proof Rum.
notes: Complimentary drink tickets available with qualifying purchases.

title: Ignition Press Pavilion
location: Ignition Pavilion at San Diego Wine & Culinary Center
description: Visit the Ignition Pavilion for a free fan experience featuring comics, collectibles, live shopping broadcasts, creator appearances, exclusive merchandise, coffee, and interactive exhibits. Highlights include the eBay Live selling lounge with livestreams throughout Comic-Con, appearances by comic creators Bill Sienkiewicz and Jim Lee, rare comic displays from Rene Nezhoda, the debut of an exclusive DC x eBay Live connecting cover, the Comic-Con debut of lifestyle brand Revenge Of, and complimentary drinks from Seven Seas Roasting Company for eligible guests while daily supplies last.
notes: Limited to the first 200 guests each day.

title: Doctor Who: Worlds of Wonder Exhibit
address: 2131 Pan American Plaza, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Explore an exhibit celebrating Doctor Who through props, characters, and interactive displays while examining the real-world science and ideas that have inspired the long-running series.
notes: Runs daily Tuesday through Sunday during Comic-Con week.

title: Stern Pinball Pop-Up Arcade
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Play Stern Pinball machines, including Pokémon and Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye, along with additional titles available throughout the arcade.

title: Hulu Animayhem
address: Hilton Gaslamp, MLK Promenade, San Diego, CA
description: Visit Hulu's animation-themed activation featuring interactive environments, themed food and drinks inspired by Futurama and King of the Hill, exclusive merchandise, and hidden details throughout the experience.

title: Sean Solomon, Wabie
description: Sean Solomon performs at Music Box with special guest Wabie during Comic-Con week.
notes: Doors open at 9:00 PM. Free with RSVP, subject to venue capacity. Standing room only.

title: The Guild Backer Exclusive Raid
description: Kickstarter backers of The Guild Web Series Back as a Movie are invited to an exclusive fan gathering featuring Felicia Day and fellow supporters.
notes: Open only to Kickstarter backers on a first-come, first-served basis. Show your pledge in the Kickstarter app for entry. The first 500 attendees will receive an exclusive commemorative ticket.

title: CBLDF SDCC Welcome Party & Auction
description: Celebrate the opening of Comic-Con with the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund during an evening gathering featuring creators, publishers, fans, and a fundraising auction supporting the organization's mission.
notes: Hosted on the Westgate Hotel Terrace. Features a silent auction, special guests, industry networking, and fundraising activities benefiting the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund. No San Diego Comic-Con badge required.

title: Thom Tran & The Comedy Nerds
description: Stand-up comedy showcase hosted by Thom Tran featuring Ryan Niemiller, Keenan Baker, Martin Morrow, and Josh Snyder.
notes: Featured performers include Ryan Niemiller (America's Got Talent), Keenan Baker (AnimeShun Podcast), Martin Morrow (B4 The Bell Wrestling Podcast), and Josh Snyder (Oberth Class).

title: Her Universe Fashion Show
location: Harbor Ballroom at Manchester Grand Hyatt San Diego
description: The annual Her Universe Fashion Show showcases original fan-designed runway looks inspired by DC Super Heroes and Super-Villains, hosted by Ashley Eckstein.
notes: Free to attend. Seating is first-come, first-served and fills quickly. No San Diego Comic-Con badge is required. Guests are encouraged to arrive early as lines typically begin forming well before the show.

title: Tor Books Party
description: Tor Books hosts an invite-only rooftop celebration during San Diego Comic-Con, bringing together authors, publishing professionals, and special guests for an evening of fantasy, science fiction, and community.
notes: Invite only.

title: Final Space Comedy Screening & Meetup
description: Attend a comedy event featuring screenings of episodes 1 and 36 of Final Space followed by a fan meetup at the Laugh Factory.
notes: 21+ only. Two-drink minimum required. Limited to two reservations per customer. Event is currently sold out.

title: Alliance Authentic Pop-Up
description: Browse preserved vinyl records, collectible figures, and Comic-Con merchandise while eligible badge holders can claim a free Handmade by Robots figure and all visitors may enter a collectible giveaway.
notes: Free Handmade by Robots figure available for Comic-Con badge holders while supplies last.

title: The Remix Ice Cream Social
description: Meet cartoonists, writers, animators, creators, and fans during this annual Comic-Con ice cream social hosted by Mixie Cartoon Mixer and the Residuals Screenwriting Community.

title: Nintendo Switch Sports Resort
location: Hilton San Diego Bayfront - The Pointe
description: Try Nintendo Switch Sports Resort ahead of its official release by playing a selection of sports at this hands-on gaming experience. Entry is available on a first-come, first-served basis.
notes: The Rizzler competition takes place from 1:30 PM–3:30 PM. Participants are randomly selected from guests who have already played the demo. Prizes awarded.

title: Percy Jackson and the Olympians Experience
description: Explore an interactive experience inspired by Percy Jackson and the Olympians by choosing one of three story paths themed around Percy, Annabeth, or Thalia.

title: Star Trek: Boldly Built Activation
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Visit a Star Trek-themed activation featuring an interactive photo opportunity presented in collaboration with the LEGO Group and Magic: The Gathering.
notes: Open Thursday through Sunday.

title: Pan's Labyrinth Fetch Quest
description: Take part in a free citywide scavenger hunt celebrating the 20th anniversary of Pan's Labyrinth by searching for three characters connected to the film.
notes: Participants search for one evil character, one pure of heart, and one 'with a name only the wind and the trees can pronounce.' Runs Thursday and Friday.

title: AREA 619 Speakeasy @ barleymash
description: barleymash transforms into AREA 619 with themed food, specialty drinks, and an invite-only Space Smugglers Cantina cocktail lounge.
notes: DM @barleymashsd for the secret password to access the Space Smugglers Cantina. Special menu includes the Zoidberg-er, Drax-A-Roni & Cheese, Pizza Planet Pockets, and Experiment 626 dessert.

title: Poké Puffs @ Cafe de l'Opera
description: Cafe de l'Opera is offering Pokémon-inspired Poké Puffs in multiple flavors and styles during Comic-Con week while supplies last.
notes: Available Thursday through Sunday while supplies last.

title: Garage Kitchen + Bar Super Deals
description: Garage Kitchen + Bar offers Comic-Con food and drink specials throughout the day.
notes: $20 Bottomless Mimosa Brunch (11 AM–3 PM), $6 Crazy Bob's Burger & Fries (11 AM–12 PM & 3 PM–4 PM), Happy Hour with 51% off drinks and $3 off appetizers (4 PM–6 PM).

title: Kamon Craft Cocktail Speakeasy
address: Inside Asa Bakery, San Diego, CA
description: Hidden inside Asa Bakery, Bar Kamon serves Comic-Con-inspired craft cocktails based on popular stories and animated worlds.
notes: Special cocktails include The Upside Down, Ponyo Loves Sosuke, and Spirit of the Forest.

title: Peanuts Specialty Lattes @ Spill The Beans
description: Enjoy Comic-Con-exclusive specialty lattes inspired by Peanuts characters and themes throughout the weekend.
notes: Featuring The Great Pumpkin Latte and Charlie Brown Lemon Bar Latte.

title: Lunar Landing Bar @ LandShark Bar & Grill
description: LandShark Bar & Grill transforms into the Lunar Landing Bar with a space-themed atmosphere, specialty cocktails, themed décor, photo opportunities, and live entertainment throughout Comic-Con week.
notes: Runs July 22–26. RSVP encouraged.

title: LANTERNS Training Headquarters
description: Take part in an interactive training experience inspired by HBO Max's LANTERNS, where participants complete a series of challenges based on joining the Green Lantern Corps.
notes: Reservations required. Sign-ups open July 13 at 9:00 AM PT on a first-come, first-served basis. Guests must be 18 or older. Includes Guardian briefing, target practice, trust challenges, maze navigation, escape room-style scenarios, a custom Green Lantern ring, Snapchat-powered interactive mirror, exclusive merchandise, and nearby Lantern Recharge Stations with surprise swag throughout the Gaslamp Quarter.

title: STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE
description: Explore an immersive experience inspired by STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE featuring themed environments, interactive story elements, photo opportunities, and exclusive merchandise.
notes: Features portal walkthroughs, interactive story moments, hero archetype experiences, photo opportunities with a replica machine from the series, exclusive merchandise, and personalized collectible takeaways. Open to the public while capacity allows.
tags: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe

title: Marvel Contest of Champions Gaming Lounge
location: Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge at the Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101 (San Diego Ballroom)
description: Kabam brings Marvel Contest of Champions to the Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge with playable demos, daily tournaments, the new Towers game mode, and giveaway opportunities for attendees.
notes: No SDCC badge required. Play the Towers demo to receive an exclusive pin and a spin on the prize wheel for in-game rewards and physical prizes. Experienced players can qualify for the daily on-stage tournament by posting one of the four fastest demo times.

title: SDCC Gaming Lounge
location: Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina – San Diego Ballroom
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Explore San Diego Comic-Con's official Gaming Lounge featuring console, PC, and tabletop games, open play, tournaments, demonstrations, and interactive experiences presented by participating gaming partners.
notes: Features the Naruto Mythos TCG with a daily tournament, stage programming, and merchandise. Experience Avatar: Legends with 25 PC gaming stations, two daily tournaments, autograph/sign stations, QR codes for wishlists and purchases, and social media activations. Alienware will showcase gaming laptops, interactive game demos, and a special stunt experience.

title: SDCC '26 Geek Out
description: Annual Comic-Con fan meetup where attendees can gather, enjoy free arcade games, purchase drinks, and connect with fellow fans.
notes: FREE arcade games. Hosted by @giantsizeproductions, @theuncannyexp, and @longbeachcomiccon. You must be 21 or older to enter Coin-Op Gaslamp. Event time has not yet been announced.

title: Isla Monstro: Pardy Harder in San Diego
description: Free 21+ Comic-Con celebration inspired by Isla Monstro featuring themed drinks, giveaways, appearances from cast and creative team members, and additional event activities.
notes: Must be 21+. No San Diego Comic-Con badge is required. Themed drinks, giveaways, special guests, and opportunities to meet members of the cast and creative team.

title: Peanuts x Super7 Pop-Up
address: 200 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Visit a Peanuts and Super7 pop-up featuring character experiences, collectible merchandise, themed activities, giveaways, and photo opportunities with Peanuts characters.
notes: Features the Adopt-a-Puppy experience with exclusive 8-inch Super Duper Plush collectibles, adoption certificates, puppy bandanas created with Best Friends Animal Society, Comic-Con exclusives, Snoopy & Lucy mascot photo opportunities, giveaways, and surprises.

title: Den of Geek, Roddenberry Entertainment, & Goliath Games Presents: Does It Fly?
description: Den of Geek hosts an evening celebrating the release of Fourth Wing: Rise of the Wingleader, featuring live podcast recordings, discussion of the new board game adaptation, and collectible items connected to the game.
notes: Features live tapings of Roddenberry Entertainment and Nacelle Company's Does It Fly? and POWER-UP by Den of Geek. Attendees receive one complimentary beer while supplies last. 21+ only. Event is currently full.

title: Paramount+'s The Lodge
price: Free - Ticketed - Sold Out, Stand By Available
description: Official Paramount+ immersive experience featuring themed environments and interactive experiences inspired by multiple Paramount franchises.
notes: Standby line available if tickets remain.

title: Robert A. Heinlein Blood Drive
description: Annual community blood drive held during Comic-Con weekend in partnership with the San Diego Blood Bank.
notes: Appointments made through the official registration page.

title: Nickelodeon's Fun Flows Here
address: 200 W Island Ave, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Free outdoor Nickelodeon experience featuring live entertainment, games, slime activities, character-themed photo opportunities, interactive attractions, DJ sets, raffles, and programming inspired by multiple Nickelodeon series.
notes: The New Children's Museum will be closed to the general public while the activation takes over the space.

title: Petco Interactive Zone
description: Free outdoor fan zone featuring interactive displays, shopping experiences, themed exhibits, and activities presented by participating brands throughout Comic-Con.

title: Marvel Contest of Champions Gaming Lounge
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Gaming area where attendees can play Marvel titles and participate in interactive gaming activities throughout Comic-Con.
notes: Comic-Con badge required.

title: Adult Swim on the Green
address: Behind the San Diego Convention Center
description: Outdoor Adult Swim fan festival featuring interactive attractions, games, giveaways, photo opportunities, and evening entertainment.

title: Clash of Clans
address: 849 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Interactive experience inspired by Clash of Clans featuring puzzle-solving, physical challenges, and gameplay based on the mobile game.
notes: Tickets on sale July 1.

title: Comic-Con Donut Bar
address: 401 W A St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Comic-Con-themed specialty donuts are available during convention week while supplies last.
notes: Arrive early. Popular items frequently sell out before noon.

title: False Idol x Geeki Tiki Event
address: 675 W Beech St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Celebrate the 10th anniversary of Geeki Tikis during a themed event featuring specialty drinks, collectible merchandise, giveaways, raffles, and limited-edition releases.
notes: Three timed sessions. Guests may attend only one session. Tickets sold separately.

title: Chuck Jones Gallery Pop-Up & Steve Barton Meet & Greet
address: 809 W Harbor Dr, Seaport Village, San Diego, CA
description: Meet Disney artist Steve Barton during the Chuck Jones Gallery Comic-Con pop-up while viewing original artwork and featured gallery exhibits.

title: PopUp Bagels Volkswagen Bus
description: Fresh-baked PopUp Bagels are served from the company's Volkswagen Bus each morning while supplies last.
notes: Arrive early. Frequently sells out.

title: Pendry Hotel Donut Bar
description: Comic-Con-themed gourmet donuts are served each morning during convention week.

title: Kitties and Coffee for Comic Con
description: Reserve a 50-minute visit to enjoy a menu item while spending time with adoptable cats at The Cat Cafe during Comic-Con week.
notes: Reservations recommended.

title: Superhero Tea at The Westgate Hotel
description: Enjoy a Comic-Con-themed afternoon tea featuring specialty teas, themed desserts, and event décor.
notes: Reservations required.

title: Candyland Cafe
description: Visit a Candy Land-inspired pop-up featuring themed desserts, interactive elements, and colorful photo opportunities.

title: David Baron's 5th Annual Bar Con
description: Annual Comic-Con networking meetup where fans, creators, and industry professionals gather in an informal setting.

title: SDCC Away Team Tiki Meet Up
location: Omni San Diego Hotel at the Ballpark
description: Annual Star Trek fan meetup where attendees gather for a tiki-themed afternoon during Comic-Con.
notes: Star Trek attire is appreciated but not required. Final event time is still pending and may be updated.

title: Comic-Con Themed Bar Crawl
description: Join a Comic-Con-themed bar crawl visiting participating Gaslamp venues throughout the evening.

title: Lunar Distribution Comic Book Retailer Meet-And-Greet
description: Invite-only networking event where comic book retailers meet with Lunar Distribution during Comic-Con.
notes: Attendance is limited to two representatives per active comic shop account in good standing with Lunar Distribution.

title: Doctor Who Quiz Night
location: Shakespeare Pub - 3 miles away from Con Center
description: Doctor Who-themed trivia night featuring prizes and hosted by BBC Hollywood correspondent Sandro Monetti.

title: One Piece Cosplay Gathering
description: Group cosplay meetup and photo session for One Piece fans and cosplayers.
notes: All One Piece cosplayers and fans welcome.

title: Comic-Con Oral History Project
description: Learn about the history of San Diego Comic-Con through interviews, archival materials, and historical discussion.

title: Disney Lorcana Pre-Release
description: Play and preview the newest Disney Lorcana release during this prerelease event.
notes: Convention badge required.

title: Con Rangers Meet Up
description: Comic-Con fan meetup bringing together members of the Con Rangers community and other attendees.

title: Indigi-Con
description: Community event celebrating Indigenous creators, artists, storytellers, and culture during Comic-Con.

title: Comic Art Summit
description: Series of presentations and discussions exploring comics scholarship, history, and the comic arts.

title: FiLAm Creator Mini-Con
address: 1985 National Avenue, Suite 115, San Diego, CA
description: Browse a two-day pop-up event highlighting Filipino American creators working in comics, literature, filmmaking, and other creative fields.

title: Fandom Party
description: Invite-only Comic-Con celebration hosted by Fandom for invited guests, creators, partners, and industry attendees.

title: XLE: Party Plus Ultra
description: Anime-inspired nightlife event featuring DJs, cosplay, themed entertainment, and special guests during Comic-Con.

title: Afrofuturism Lounge
description: Networking event celebrating Afrofuturism through conversations, community, and creative programming during Comic-Con.

title: Lumpia Con Mixer
description: Community mixer bringing together attendees, creators, and supporters of Lumpia Con during Comic-Con week.

title: THE TRANSFORMERS: THE MOVIE 40th Anniversary Celebration of Life Concert
description: Celebrate the 40th anniversary of The Transformers: The Movie during a live concert featuring performances by Knights of Unicron, Stan Bush, Vince DiCola, Cold Slither, and Britta Phillips, the original singing voice of Jem from Jem and the Holograms.
notes: VIP entry begins at 6:00 PM. General Admission doors open at 8:00 PM.

title: Mighty Jaxx Mighty Mic Drop
description: Evening event hosted by Mighty Jaxx celebrating designer toys and collectibles during Comic-Con.
notes: Tickets on sale June 17.

title: Mark Ellis & Jenn Sterger: Pop Culture Comedy
address: 750 Sixth Avenue, 2nd Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Live comedy show featuring Mark Ellis and Jenn Sterger with stand-up, storytelling, and discussions centered on film, television, comics, and gaming.

title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise
description: Live concert by alternative rock band Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Gallagher Square.

title: Adult Swim on the Green: Night of New
address: Behind the San Diego Convention Center, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Adult Swim presents an evening of exclusive preview screenings followed by a DJ dance party as part of the Adult Swim on the Green festival.
notes: Open to the public. No Comic-Con badge required. First come, first served. Nightly DJ Dance Party from 9:00 PM–10:00 PM. Event is 18+.

title: Adult Swim on the Green: Cosplay Dance Party
address: Behind the San Diego Convention Center, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Adult Swim concludes the evening with a public cosplay dance party featuring a live DJ as part of the Adult Swim on the Green programming.

title: David Koechner Comedy Show
address: 750 Sixth Ave, 2nd Floor, San Diego, CA
description: Live stand-up comedy performance by actor and comedian David Koechner.

title: Rooftop Cinema Club: A Star is Born
address: 1835 Columbia St 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Watch an outdoor rooftop screening of A Star is Born at Rooftop Cinema Club in Little Italy.

title: Kevin Smith's Fatman Beyond
address: 818 B Sixth Ave, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Kevin Smith records a live episode of Fatman Beyond during Comic-Con.

title: Rooftop Cinema Club: The Hangover
address: 1835 Columbia St 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Watch a late-night rooftop screening of The Hangover at Rooftop Cinema Club in Little Italy.
